contents.value:
```nginx
location / { ... }          # prefix match
location = /exact { ... }    # exact match
location ~ \.php$ { ... }    # regex match
location ^~ /images/ { ... } # prefix priority
```
**location** matches request URIs and applies configuration. Priority: exact (=) > prefix (^~) > regex (~, ~*) > prefix.

```nginx
rewrite ^/blog/(.*)$ /articles/$1 permanent;
```
**rewrite** transforms the request URI using regex. Flags: last, break, redirect (302), permanent (301).

```nginx
client_max_body_size 50M;
```
**client_max_body_size** sets the max upload size. Returns 413 (Request Entity Too Large) if exceeded. Default is 1M.
